description: Space-filling Latin-hypercube sample over continuous factor ranges, for computer experiments / simulations where even coverage of a high-dimensional space is wanted with few points; returned in real units.
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — the sample is reproducible from SPEC_JSON.seed (pyDOE3 lhs uses the numpy global RNG)
each factor needs a (low, high) range
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: factors (required dict {name:[low,high]}), n_samples (required int), criterion (str, default 'maximin'), seed (int), randomize (bool, default false). Output: experimental_runs.csv under record_store.
limitation: Designed for continuous factors and simulation/computer experiments, not for categorical levels or physical replication. When pyDOE3 is absent the porter writes an empty {} artifact.
